query:
UPDATE invoices
            SET lhdn_status         = 'Submitted',
                lhdn_submission_uid = ?,
                lhdn_uuid           = ?,
                signature           = ?,
                ubl_xml             = ?,
                doc_digest          = ?,
                error_json          = NULL,
                submitted_at        = ?,
                next_attempt_at     = NULL,
                updated_at          = ?
            WHERE id = ?
